patch:
--- a/firmware.c
+++ b/firmware.c
@@ -4,9 +4,9 @@
 #include <stdint.h>
 
 #define TIMER_ERR_OK        0
-#define TIMER_ERR_INVALID  -1
-#define TIMER_ERR_BUSY     -2
-#define TIMER_ERR_TIMEOUT  -3
+#define TIMER_ERR_INVALID  -2
+#define TIMER_ERR_BUSY     -3
+#define TIMER_ERR_TIMEOUT  -4
 
 int timer_start(uint8_t id, uint32_t period_ms);
 int timer_stop(uint8_t id);
description: Error code macros `TIMER_ERR_INVALID`, `TIMER_ERR_BUSY`, and `TIMER_ERR_TIMEOUT` were renumbered, breaking callers that compare return values against these constants.
